problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
